purpose: Machine-readable WellFit visual regression and screenshot smoke-check plan for future Codex/AI agents. It defines optional, non-product-logic browser validation for important public, mobile beta-preview, and protected app routes while keeping screenshots out of source control and avoiding flaky mandatory CI requirements.

routeGroups.description: Public marketing, registration, help, and legal routes that can be smoke-checked without credentials.

Mobile beta-preview and PWA device-test routes that must preserve the current mobile shell, install/QR guidance, permission fallback behavior, and beta wording without activating protected economy, health, privacy, location, camera, motion, AR, or reward-authority logic.

Protected app or beta-preview dashboard routes. Full screenshot validation requires an approved test-user/session plan; unauthenticated smoke checks may only document redirects, login blockers, or beta-preview availability.

screenshotArtifactPolicy.gitPolicy: generated-artifacts-only; do not commit screenshots, videos, traces, or browser caches
screenshotArtifactPolicy.retention: local PR evidence only unless a reviewer explicitly requests an attached artifact
screenshotArtifactPolicy.redactionRule: Do not capture authenticated personal data, secrets, private health data, child data, location data, wallet/payment state, or final reward authority evidence. Use approved seed/demo data only.

browserRequirement.installPolicy: Do not install browser dependencies automatically from this check. If browser support is unavailable, report the skip and exit 0.

routesToCheck.comparisonNote: Mobile beta, buddy, avatar, AR, and mission surfaces stay smoke-only until deterministic demo state and masks are approved.

routesToCheck.authLimitation: requires approved test user/session or documented beta-preview blocker
routesToCheck.comparisonNote: Protected app comparison is off until an approved test-user/session plan and seeded demo data exist.

Mobile/PWA device smoke only; camera, pose, face, motion, AR/canvas, buddy animation, and mission timer states remain dynamic and require device_test_required/review_required instead of strict pixel matching.

protectedRoutesAndAuthLimitations.defaultRule: Do not use real user credentials or capture real user data. Protected route screenshots require an approved test account, seeded demo data, or explicit documentation that auth blocks full visual validation.
protectedRoutesAndAuthLimitations.checkBehaviorWithoutAuth: Allowed only for safe smoke documentation of HTTP reachability, redirects, not-found states, or beta-preview screens. Do not treat unauthenticated protected-route screenshots as final visual approval.

screenshotRequiredRules: Required for perceptible UI changes to public_core routes when a runnable preview and browser runner are available.
Required for perceptible UI changes to mobile_beta_preview routes when a runnable preview and browser runner are available.
Required for app shell, navigation, footer, dashboard, mission, buddy, legal/help, and mobile navigation changes when affected routes are accessible safely.
Protected app routes require either screenshots from an approved test-user/demo session or a written blocker explaining why screenshots could not be captured.
If browser support is unavailable in the environment, agents must run the route-register validation, record SKIPPED_BROWSER_UNAVAILABLE, and avoid making the main build fail for that reason.
safetyRules: This plan and its checker are QA/documentation support only and must never rewrite product files.
Do not modify token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward authority, health, child, location, privacy, or compliance logic while using this plan.
Do not create duplicate route, architecture, visual-design, or browser-test systems; keep future additions mapped through this register, Work Map, and the existing wellfit-dev-agent quality gate.

Mobile/PWA device tests must mark uncertain camera, pose, face, DeviceMotion, WebGL/AR, PWA install, browser, OS, or privacy behavior as device_test_required or review_required instead of inventing behavior or changing runtime code.

baselineScreenshotPolicy.gitPolicy: Do not commit baseline screenshots until a maintainer approves a dedicated small baseline review; keep local/generated baselines under ignored agent output paths for now.
baselineScreenshotPolicy.naming: Use screenshotArtifactPolicy.filenameTemplate so baseline/current pairs can be detected without adding binaries to the repo.

currentScreenshotPolicy.gitPolicy: Generated current screenshots are local QA artifacts only and must remain in ignored agent output paths.

ignoredDynamicAreas.concept: Future tolerant/strict comparison may mask named dynamic page areas before pixel comparison. Masks must be narrow, route-scoped, documented here, and must not hide compliance, auth, reward-authority, payment, wallet, health, privacy, child-safety, or location defects.
allowedExamples: animated gradients or non-critical decorative particles
AR camera/canvas placeholders in demo mode
mission progress widgets backed by seeded/demo state

mobilePwaDeviceTestPlan.purpose: Manual device/browser test matrix for existing WellFit mobile/PWA routes, install flow, camera/pose/face/motion permissions, WebGL/AR fallbacks, and privacy/safety boundaries. This metadata is QA planning only and must not change runtime code, service worker, manifest, public assets, tracking, consent, protected data handling, or reward/mission authority.

permissionAndFallbackChecks.camera: accepted and denied states are normal test cases; unclear behavior is review_required; no raw image/video storage may be introduced
permissionAndFallbackChecks.poseFaceMediaPipe: loading, failure, performance, and fallback behavior are device_test_required; no face templates or biometric persistence may be introduced
permissionAndFallbackChecks.deviceMotion: permission, sensor availability, and weak-context/HTTPS limitations are device_test_required/review_required; no raw motion history may be introduced
permissionAndFallbackChecks.webglAr: 3D Flammi/canvas loading, camera overlay, tap/call/move controls, performance, battery, heat, and fallback behavior are device_test_required; no Unity dependency or reward authority may be introduced

safetyBoundaries: no protected data expansion, production tracking, new consent fields, raw images/video, face/biometric templates, health/location/raw sensor storage, or third-party analytics
no reward, XP, points, mission completion, anti-cheat, leaderboard, inventory, rare item, token, payment, or payout authority from camera, pose, face, motion, PWA install, or AR signals
screenshots are smoke/tolerant QA evidence only; strict pixel matching remains disallowed for camera, AR/canvas, buddy animation, pose skeleton, and mission timer surfaces
